message:
fix: clean up code issues found during review

Two fixes found during random codebase exploration:

src/examples.ts:
- Combine duplicate imports from utils.js into single import statement
- Pure style fix, no behavioral change

src/curate.ts:
- Remove unused ALL_MARKERS constant (dead code)
- Add defensive null coalescing for bullet.tags in invertToAntiPattern
- Previously, if a bullet had undefined tags (possible with legacy data),
  spreading would crash with "undefined is not iterable"
- Now uses (bullet.tags || []) consistent with other array spreads in
  the same function (sourceSessions, sourceAgents)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
